name: dgvoodoo-nowatermark
description: dgVoodoo2 우하단 'dgVoodoo' 워터마크를 제거한다. D3D8.dll은 dgVoodoo2 2.87.2 release 래퍼이며 패킹된 바이너리(.text 엔트로피 ~7.913, 섹션명 stripped)라 워터마크 렌더/문자열/비트맵을 안전하게 정적 바이트패치할 수 없다. 따라서 conf 레버(dgVoodooWatermark)로 끈다. 생성기=tools/logh7_dgvoodoo_nowatermark.py.

re.dllVersion: FileDescription='dgVoodoo 2.87.2 - Direct3D8', FileVersion=4.8.2.134, ProductVersion=2.8.7.2, Copyright (C) 2013-2026 (release build, not debug/spec)
re.packed: First two PE sections are name-stripped; the data/code section (raw 0x400..0x63a00) has Shannon entropy 7.913 of 8.0 → compressed/encrypted by dgVoodoo's own packer. The watermark glyphs are a baked-in texture/atlas, NOT a literal 'dgVoodoo' string in code: the only UTF-16LE 'dgVoodoo' hits (file 0x65c14, 0x65d64) are the VERSIONINFO resource (FileDescription/ProductName), not the rendered overlay. There is no ASCII/UTF-16 'Watermark' string in the image. Conclusion: no safe same-length byte patch exists for the render path inside a packed section (bytes are transformed at unpack time; a literal patch is either inert or corrupts the unpacker/integrity), and the task forbids breaking game rendering. So the watermark is disabled via the documented conf flag instead.
re.confMechanism: dgVoodoo2 only adopts a conf whose 'Version' AND key-set structure match the DLL build, otherwise it silently falls back to defaults (watermark ON). The reference value for build 2.87.2 is Version=0x287 (cf. 0x280=2.8.2, 0x283=2.83.3 from the official FAQ). To eliminate any structural-rejection risk, the conf is rebuilt from the EXACT stock 2.87.2 template that ships alongside this DLL (.omo/work/dgVoodoo2_87_2/dgVoodoo.conf, key-set verified identical) with only watermark + LOGH remaster values overridden.

confChanges.note: 핵심: D3D8/9 우하단 'dgVoodoo' 워터마크 오버레이를 끈다.
Glide 워터마크 off. 이 게임은 D3D8 경로라 무관하나 일관성 위해 함께 off.
워터마크가 켜질 때의 표시 시간(0=infinite). 워터마크 off라 무의미하나 명시 유지.

preservedRemaster.note: 기존 설치 conf의 LOGH 리마스터 화질값을 그대로 유지 → 워터마크만 제거하고 게임 렌더는 동일.

verify: Version=0x287 matches DLL 2.87.2; dgVoodooWatermark=false; 3DfxWatermark=false; conf key-set identical to stock template (no structural rejection); CRLF preserved, no BOM, 362 lines.
needsLive: 실클라에서 우하단 'dgVoodoo' 워터마크가 사라지고 게임 렌더가 정상인지 확인. ⚠️ BOTHTEC 스플래시 ~30초 대기 후 스크린샷.
